description: Blueprint of all configurable parameters, input fields, and settings keys in management views

platform_name.description: Platform brand name shown on header and titles

min_withdrawal.description: Minimum amount required to request withdrawal

withdrawal_fee.description: Flat rate fee deducted from withdrawals

smtp_gmail_user.description: Gmail email address for nodemailer transporter

smtp_proton_secure.description: Whether to use TLS/SSL for Proton bridge

smtp_servers.description: SMTP servers list comma-separated for round-robin rotation

resend_api_key.description: API Key for Resend service delivery

name.description: Plan display title shown on plans list

entryFee.description: One-time cost to unlock or invest in the plan

lockPeriodDays.description: Number of days deposits are locked

isActive.description: Whether plan is open for new investments

isBinaryMlmEnabled.description: Toggle to bind plan to Alliance Growth Network

stakingEnabled.description: Allow optional lockup staking on deposit creation

stakingBonusPercent.description: Additional daily yield percentage for staked deposits

stakingEarlyWithdrawalPenalty.description: Penalty fee percent for withdrawing before maturity

showPairingRulesInPlanDetails.description: Render pairings levels grid on cards details

default_logic_builder_config.description: Default configuration populated on Logic Builder resets

default_nova_points_config.description: Default configuration populated on Nova Points resets
